docker-images.title: Docker Images
docker-images.description: Local development only. Both the Orchestrator and Playwright runner run as Docker images that must be built on your local machine before use.

environment-variables.title: Environment Variables
environment-variables.description: Local development only. Each service reads its configuration from environment variables. Defaults are designed to work out-of-the-box for local dev.

firebase-and-data.title: Firebase & Data Storage
firebase-and-data.description: Local development only. The app uses a live (remote) Firebase project even during local development — there is no local Firebase emulator configured.

overview.title: Overview
overview.description: This documentation covers local development only.

prerequisites.title: Prerequisites
prerequisites.description: Local development only. The following tools must be installed on your machine before starting.

quick-start.title: Quick Start
quick-start.description: Local development only. This gets all services running with a single script.

services-and-ports.title: Services & Ports
services-and-ports.description: Local development only. Each service runs on a fixed port and communicates over localhost or host.docker.internal.

troubleshooting.title: Troubleshooting
troubleshooting.description: Local development only. Common issues and how to resolve them.

workflow-execution.title: Workflow Execution Flow
workflow-execution.description: Local development only. This describes the full journey of a workflow run from the moment you click "Run" in the editor.
